topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into ARCore. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for AR/VR Developer roles.
whyItMatters: ARCore is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing ARCore in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given ARCore snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of ARCore?
How does ARCore handle memory management?
